message:
test(ftui-widgets): bd-1lg.16 accessibility roles and keyboard navigation

42 integration tests covering the full keyboard accessibility surface:

- Tab/Shift-Tab navigation (6 tests): tab order, skipping non-focusable
  and negative-index widgets, empty graph edge case
- Enter/Space activation (5 tests): list selection, tree toggle, tab
  switch, leaf node no-op
- Arrow key navigation (6 tests): list up/down, spatial focus graph
  (2x2 grid), tree expand/collapse with Right/Left
- Focus traps & modals (4 tests): trap confines navigation, prevents
  escape, modal config defaults to close-on-escape
- High-contrast theme (5 tests): WCAG AA contrast ratio, color
  distinctness, all 8 preset themes validated
- Focus indicators (5 tests): default visibility, style overlay,
  underline, border, none preserves base
- Focus events (3 tests): FocusGained, FocusMoved, FocusLost
- Focus history & host (4 tests): back navigation, host blur/focus,
  change counter metrics
- Widget keyboard a11y (4 tests): vi j/k, escape clears filter,
  tab boundary behavior

Also closes bd-1lg.25, bd-1lg.24, bd-1lg.23, bd-2xj.1, bd-1lg.17,
bd-1lg.15 as already implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
